clean_signed_off_worktree.notes: RC evidence report generated from the final signed-off commit with a clean worktree.

frontend_npm_ci.notes: Command output or workflow evidence that frontend dependencies installed from package-lock.json.

github_actions_aidm_ci.notes: Successful AIDM CI run URL for the signed-off commit.

github_actions_closed_beta_rc.notes: Successful manual Closed Beta RC workflow run URL for the signed-off commit.

github_actions_rc_artifact.notes: Artifact URL or run artifact reference containing the RC report, issue snippets, release packet, source archive, security/export-import evidence, GitHub Actions evidence, and visual-smoke artifacts.

hosted_backup_restore.notes: Provider-specific hosted/staging backup and restore drill evidence.

hosted_beta_slo_baseline.notes: Target-environment beta SLO baseline generated before tester expansion.

hosted_cookie_auth.notes: Passing hosted browser cookie-auth, CSRF, logout, role refresh, and Socket.IO auth smoke evidence.

hosted_deployment_readiness.notes: Passing hosted/staging deployment-readiness report for health, metrics, headers, auth, CORS, and provider checks.

hosted_env_config.notes: Evidence for auth-required mode, strong token, explicit CORS, cookie settings, worker model, observability provider, and alert owner.

hosted_export_import.notes: Passing target-environment session export/import smoke evidence.

hosted_external_telemetry.notes: Proof that the configured external telemetry endpoint receives events when enabled.

hosted_non_admin_forbidden.notes: Passing hosted non-admin forbidden-response evidence for combat, bestiary, and beta operator endpoints.

hosted_socketio_worker_process.notes: Platform process/config evidence showing the documented RC worker model and worker count.

make_clean.notes: Evidence that make clean was run or reviewed before source packaging.

make_clean_deps.notes: Evidence that dependency folders were removed or intentionally excluded before source handoff.

multi_worker_socketio_staging.notes: Keep not_applicable only when hosted_socketio_worker_process proves RC1 single-worker mode. Set to provided with sticky/message-queue proof otherwise.

rc_issue_closure_review.notes: Evidence that RC gate issues were closed with generated issue snippets or template entries.

source_archive_attachment.notes: Link/path showing the generated source archive and checksum were attached for reviewer download.
